purpose: Close the phase-02 data/repository observable startup-state row after wiring the real runtime startup path through LoginPreferencesService and StartupStore.

set.targetBehavior: LoginPreferencesService.readLoginState now feeds StartupStore.resolveStartRoute during EntryAbility.onCreate, and the resolved route seeds bootstrapStartRoute before FoodikeBootstrap loads. This preserves the source one-shot observable startup contract: the persisted login flag is read before loading clears and before the shell becomes interactive.
verificationEvidence: Manual code review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/data/session/login_preferences_service.cj::LoginPreferencesService.readLoginState, entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/features/startup/startup_store.cj::StartupStore.resolveStartRoute, and entry/src/main/cangjie/app_ability.cj::EntryAbility.onCreate now form the runtime startup chain that reads the persisted login flag and resolves the first route before bootstrap content loads.

Manual code review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/app/bootstrap_page.cj::FoodikeBootstrap.currentRoute initializes from bootstrapStartRoute, so the first rendered shell route matches the resolved startup state.

Test verification: `cjpm.exe test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` passed in `D:\workspace\Foodike\Foodike-Harmony\entry` with the phase test env overlay, covering entry/src/test/cangjie/phase02_startup_navigation_test.cj including `resolvesLoggedOutUsersToOnboarding`, `resolvesLoggedInUsersToHome`, and `startupStorePublishesResolvedRouteAndClearsLoading`.
set.notes: Closed as equivalent for phase 02 because the source `Flow<Boolean>` is only consumed once via `first()` during splash initialization, and the target now performs the same one-shot persisted-state-to-route handoff through the repository/store surfaces used at runtime.
